name: Sweet Pickles (Short Process)
recipeIngredient: 1 gallon Medium-sized cucumbers, cut into 1-inch chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cucumber chunks and salt. Place in a large dishpan or crock and add boiling water to cover. Let stand overnight, then drain.
2. Mix together sugar, vinegar, and spices in a large saucepan. Turn the heat to high. When it comes to a boil, add the pickles and return to the boiling point. Spoon into hot sterilized jars and seal.
3. Makes 8 pints.
Source: The Best Of Amish Cooking by Phyllis Pellman Michael Hatala, Prodigy Food & Wine Board
